front.title: Multi-Agent Delegation in Sovereign Object Systems

abstract.t: This document specifies the Multi-Agent Delegation (MAD) protocol for the Sovereign Object OS (SOOS) governance architecture. It defines how authority is structured, propagated, and enforced when multiple AI agents coordinate in a SOOS-governed execution environment. The specification covers the Narrowing Property invariant for mandate delegation chains, SO Instance Topology types for multi-agent workflow patterns, SO Cluster coordination primitives for parallel and dynamic agent topologies, and the Orchestrator-Specialist interaction model. MAD is the multi-agent coordination complement to the governance primitives defined in draft-sato-soos-aep, draft-sato-soos-sov, and draft-sato-soos-mjwt.
